meta.poznamky: start_blocks_xml obsahuje dva hotové svislé sloupce. Chybí smyčka s příčlemi. Student musí přidat controls_repeat_ext s příkazy pro kreslení příčlí. Geometrie: levý sloupec nakreslen od (90,80)→(90,200), PenUp na (90,80), pravý sloupec (120,80)→(120,200). Příčle: 4× forward(30) z levého sloupce vpravo, na y=80,110,140,170.

cms.task_text: Dva svislé sloupce žebříku jsou již nakresleny. [hlp]Doplňte smyčku pro 4 příčle[/hlp]. Každá příčel je [hlp]30 pixelů dlouhá[/hlp] a příčle jsou od sebe vzdáleny [hlp]30 pixelů[/hlp]. Nezapomeňte použít [hlp]pero[/hlp] pro přesuny mezi příčlemi.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b2"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b6"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b7"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b8"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b9"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b10"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b11"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b2"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b6"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b7"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b8"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b9"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b10"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b11"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="n1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b12"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b13"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b14"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b15"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b16"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b17"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b18"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
